query: SELECT id, orderNumber, status, source, createdAt, updatedAt, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, createdAt, updatedAt) as seconds_to_update FROM orders WHERE establishmentId = 30001 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
